chapter_title.en: Chapter on a Muslim Killing a Dhimmi, a Slave, a Mudabbar, or a Mukatab, or Them Killing a Muslim

text: 5253 - وَ قَدْ رُوِيَ: "أَنَّ دِيَةَ اَلْيَهُودِيِّ وَ اَلنَّصْرَانِيِّ وَ اَلْمَجُوسِيِّ أَرْبَعَةُ آلاَفِ دِرْهَمٍ أَرْبَعَةُ آلاَفِ دِرْهَمٍ لِأَنَّهُمْ أَهْلُ اَلْكِتَابِ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: Hadith.5253 - It has been narrated: "The blood money (diyyah) for a Jew, a Christian, and a Magian is four thousand dirhams, four thousand dirhams because they are People of the Book."
